  children={"批量更新自动化状态"}

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/automations/status"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



一次性更新多个自动化的启用状态。

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["automationIds","enabled"],"properties":{"automationIds":{"type":"array","description":"自动化 ID 列表。","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"string"}},"enabled":{"type":"boolean","description":"新启用状态。true：启用；false：禁用。"}},"title":"UpdateAutomationStatusRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
